examples: The luminous dial on the clock showed five minutes to seven.
Encompassed in a luminous cloud, of which he was now merely the fiery heart, he swung through unthinkable arcs of oscillation, like a vast pendulum.
They painted the door a luminous green.
Also in Springbrook National Park, luminous mushrooms of the Mycena species glow green on summer nights.
This is high architectural drama, a luminous and exhilarating invitation into the structure's life and use.
